---
name: code-reviewing
description: Reviews code for bugs, security issues, and quality improvements
---

<!-- PromptScript 2026-03-04T21:41:05.478Z - do not edit -->

## Review Checklist

### Correctness

- Logic errors and edge cases
- Null/undefined handling
- Error handling completeness

### Security

- Input validation
- Injection risks
- Sensitive data exposure

### Quality

- Code readability
- Function complexity
- DRY principle

## Feedback Format

**[SEVERITY]** Brief description
Location: `file:line`
Problem: What's wrong
Suggestion: How to fix
